sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50626" key="i)oulofo/ros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰουλοφόρος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype></foreign>, <sense id="n50626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">downy</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">γένυς</foreign> Demitsas <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Μακεδ</foreign>.No.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">410</biblScope> </bibl> (Thessalonica, <date TEIform="date">ii A.D.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
